zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Stucley於大約1434年出生在英國英格蘭戴文時，她的父親Hugh Stucley37歲，母親Katherine Affeton31歲。她於大約1471年與John Wadham在英國戴文梅利費爾德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1520年在英國英格蘭戴文布藍斯可姆享年87歲。

zh-hans.Branscombe, Devon, England: 英国英格兰戴文布藍斯可姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Stucley于大约1434年出生在英国英格兰戴文时，她的父亲Hugh Stucley37岁，母亲Katherine Affeton31岁。她于大约1471年与John Wadham在英国戴文梅利費爾德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1520年在英国英格兰戴文布藍斯可姆享年87岁。

nameMeanings.name: Stucley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name primarily from Stukeley (Hunts), recorded as Stivecle in 1086, but occasionally from Stewkley (Bucks), recorded as Stiuecelea in 1183.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Stucley was born about 1434, in Devon, England, United Kingdom, her father, Hugh Stucley, was 37 and her mother, Katherine Affeton, was 31. She married John Wadham about 1471, in Merryfield, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1520, in Branscombe, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 87.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Stucley est née environ 1434, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Hugh Stucley, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Katherine Affeton, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé John Wadham environ 1471, à Merryfield, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1520, à Branscombe, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 87 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Stucley um 1434 in Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh Stucley 37 und ihre Mutter Katherine Affeton 31. Sie hat um 1471 in Merryfield, Devon, England John Wadham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1520 im Alter von 87 Jahren in Branscombe, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Stucley è nata il circa 1434 nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Hugh Stucley, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Katherine Affeton, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato John Wadham circa 1471, nel Merryfield, Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1520, nel Branscombe, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 87 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Stucleyが約1434年にイギリスイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父Hugh Stucleyは37歳，母Katherine Affetonは31歳であった。約1471年にイギリスデボンメリフィールドでJohn Wadhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1520年にイギリスイギリスデボンブランスコンベで87歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Stucley(이)가 대략 1434년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh Stucley(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katherine Affeton(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 대략 1471년 영국 데폰 머리필드에서 John Wadham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1520년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 브랜스코브에서 87세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Stucley nasceu aproximadamente 1434, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Hugh Stucley, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Affeton, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com John Wadham aproximadamente 1471, em Merryfield, Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1520, em Branscombe, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 87 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Stucley родилась около 1434 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Hugh Stucley было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine Affeton, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Wadham около 1471 г. в местности миррифиелд, девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1520 г. в местности бранскомб, девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 87 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Stucley nació aproximadamente 1434, en Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Hugh Stucley, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Katherine Affeton, tenía 31 años. Se casó con John Wadham aproximadamente 1471, en Merryfield, Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1520, en Branscombe, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 87 años.
